endpoints.name: Deletes a specific file
endpoints.notes: Replace {{XERO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your XERO ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: Deletes an existing file association
endpoints.description: By passing in the appropriate options, you can create a new folder
endpoints.notes: Replace {{XERO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your XERO ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{OBJECTID}} with a real objectid.

endpoints.name: Retrieves the content of a specific file
endpoints.description: By passing in the appropriate options, retrieve data for specific file
endpoints.notes: Replace {{XERO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your XERO ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: Deletes a folder
endpoints.description: By passing in the appropriate ID, you can delete a folder
endpoints.notes: Replace {{XERO_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your XERO ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FOLDERID}} with a real folderid.
